name: Atlantis
description: The capital of the Deep Realm and the greatest city beneath the Endless Ocean. Built from coral, pearl, crystal, and ancient Atlantean stone, Atlantis serves as the political, military, cultural, and economic heart of the underwater world.

name: Tidewarden Academy
description: The primary training facility for every Tidewarden recruit.

name: Barracks of Tides
description: Home of the recruit squads during academy training.

name: Training Grounds
description: Large combat arena, obstacle courses, and sparring circles used to train recruits.

name: Trident Palace
description: Seat of King Aurelion Veyrath IX and the Atlantean Crown.

name: Scholar's Deep
description: The greatest center of magical research, history, and knowledge in the Deep Realm.

name: Silvered Market
description: The busiest district in Atlantis and the setting for the recruits' first patrol.

name: Coral Gardens
description: A peaceful district filled with colorful coral, memorials, and walking paths. Nella's funeral is held here.

name: Tideshield Docks
description: Military and civilian harbor where merchant vessels and Tidewarden patrols depart.

name: Artisans' Below
description: The industrial district where armorers, inventors, sculptors, jewelers, and craftsmen work.

name: Deep Gate
description: The heavily fortified eastern gate through which Tidewarden patrols leave Atlantis for the Deep Realm.

name: The Trench Beacon
description: An ancient Atlantean beacon overlooking an endless abyss. Massive coral machinery, glowing runes, and a giant crystal power the structure.

name: The Deep Trench
description: A seemingly bottomless trench descending into complete darkness. Ancient ruins, whale skeletons, and bioluminescent life disappear into the abyss.

name: Project Tidefall Facility
description: An abandoned research facility connected to Project Tidefall and the Experimental Deepborn Hybrid.

name: The Drowned Ward
description: Forgotten maintenance tunnels beneath Atlantis where few citizens ever travel.

name: Maintenance Tunnels
description: Ancient maintenance corridors beneath the Silvered Market where Nella's trail ultimately leads.
